title: Symbolanthus quelchii
taxonomy: Symbolanthus quelchii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions. This plant belongs to the genus Symbolanthus, which is part of the larger family of gentian plants. The classification of Symbolanthus quelchii includes its kingdom as Plantae, and it is further categorized under the division Magnoliophyta. As a flowering plant, its classification also includes the class Magnoliopsida.
